pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page introducing the voiceover and acting services, with quick access to demos, showreels, planning tools, and newsletter signup.
primary_functions: Introduce the talent’s voiceover and acting offerings and highlight key strengths.
Provide prominent links to Voiceover, Acting, Rates & Quotes, Project Planner, Clients & Testimonials, and Contact / Booking pages.
Show a small selection of featured commercial voiceover demos and drama showreels with inline play buttons.

Offer a footer newsletter signup form where users can enter email, choose areas of interest (commercial voiceover, animation, drama acting), select monthly frequency, adjust any pre-selected weekly options, opt into casting availability updates, and subscribe.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click homepage Voiceover call-to-action or a 'Browse all voiceover demos' link
Click homepage Acting call-to-action or a 'Browse all showreels' link
Click 'Rates & Quotes' call-to-action in hero or rates teaser section
Click 'Plan Your Project' call-to-action in homepage planner teaser
Click 'Clients & Testimonials' teaser or logo strip link
Click 'Book a Session' primary call-to-action button
Click title or 'View details' on a featured voiceover demo card
Click thumbnail or 'View details' on a featured showreel card

access_methods.description: Users can land directly on index.html from bookmarks, search, or external links

pages.name: Voiceover
pages.description: Central hub for all voiceover demos and information, including commercial and character work with powerful filtering and sorting.
primary_functions: Display voiceover content organized in tabs such as 'Overview', 'Demos', and optionally 'Studio / FAQs', with the 'Demos' tab selected by default when arriving from main navigation.

Allow users to filter demos by category (e.g., Commercial, Character), language (e.g., English), duration (min/max length sliders or fields), rating, style (e.g., Video Game / Animation), and other tags.
Enable users to play demos directly from the results list and mark demos as Favorites via a heart icon without leaving the page.

Support selection of the 'Character' subcategory within the Demos area and further filtering (e.g., Video Game / Animation style, minimum star rating, sort by Rating – High to Low) to identify highly rated character demos.
Provide clickable demo titles that open the corresponding Voiceover Demo Detail page in order to view full ratings, runtime, and shortlist options.

incoming_params.description: Optional tab to preselect, e.g., 'demos', 'overview', or 'studio_faqs'. Defaults to 'demos' for nav clicks.
Optional demo category filter such as 'commercial' or 'character'.
Optional comma-separated list of languages to prefilter demos, e.g., 'English'.
Optional style filter identifier, e.g., 'video_game_animation'.
Optional minimum duration in seconds for prefiltering results.
Optional maximum duration in seconds for prefiltering results (e.g., 30 for under-30-second tasks).
Optional minimum rating threshold to apply when loading the Demos tab.
Optional sort option identifier, e.g., 'rating_desc', 'most_recent'.
Optional results page number to restore when returning from a demo detail view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a demo title in the Demos tab list/grid
Click 'Plan a project with these voiceover services' button in the Overview or Demos tab
Click 'Get an instant quote' link associated with commercial demos

access_methods.description: Accessible with optional query parameters to restore filters and tab selection, e.g., voiceover.html?tab=demos&category=commercial
Direct deep links from casting briefs or emails can point to specific filtered views of voiceover.html

pages.name: Voiceover Demo Detail
pages.description: Detail page for an individual voiceover demo, including audio playback, ratings, and project shortlist controls.
primary_functions: Play the selected demo with visible runtime and show contextual information such as description, usage examples, and tags (e.g., commercial, character, language).
Display overall star rating, number of reviews (including badges like '10+ reviews'), and a summary of recent reviews to support comparison between demos.
Provide an 'Add to Favorites' control to save the demo to the user’s favorites list from the detail view.
Provide an 'Add to Project Shortlist' button so users can add the chosen demo into a temporary shortlist for a specific project plan.
Offer clear navigation back to the previously filtered Demos list (via breadcrumbs or back link), preserving filter and sort state so users can compare multiple demos efficiently.

incoming_params.description: VoiceoverDemo.id of the demo to display.
Optional category filter to restore when navigating back to the Demos list.
Optional page number of the Demos list to restore on return.
Optional sort order identifier of the originating Demos list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to filtered demos' breadcrumb link
Click a 'Create project plan from this demo' call-to-action

access_methods.description: Direct links can be shared with clients for a specific demo detail view

pages.name: Acting
pages.description: Acting portfolio hub focused on on-camera work, with a Showreels tab and filters for drama and other genres.
primary_functions: Present acting content in tabs such as 'Overview' and 'Showreels', with the 'Showreels' tab selected when arriving from the main navigation.
Allow users to filter showreels by genre (e.g., Drama), year filmed (with a minimum year setting such as 2019), and duration (min length slider/field).
Provide sorting options above the showreel grid, such as 'Most Recent First', to surface recent work.
Display showreels in a grid or list with thumbnails and titles that can be clicked to open the Showreel Detail page.
Optionally allow inline playback of showreels from the grid while still offering a more detailed view on the Showreel Detail page.

incoming_params.description: Optional tab identifier such as 'showreels' or 'overview'. Defaults to 'showreels' from main navigation.
Optional showreel genre filter, e.g., 'drama'.
Optional minimum year for showreels, e.g., 2019.
Optional maximum year for showreels.
Optional minimum showreel duration in seconds for prefiltering.
Optional maximum showreel duration in seconds for prefiltering.
Optional sort order identifier, e.g., 'most_recent'.
Optional results page number to restore when returning from a showreel detail view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a showreel thumbnail or title in the Showreels tab
Click 'Plan an acting project' in the Overview or Showreels tab
Click 'Discuss rates for on-camera work' link

access_methods.description: Casting teams can deep-link to a filtered acting showreels view

pages.name: Showreel Detail
pages.description: Detail page for an individual acting showreel, optimized for casting decisions and casting list management.
primary_functions: Play the full showreel video with clear display of runtime, year filmed, genre tags (e.g., Drama), and brief role/context description.
Provide an 'Add to Casting List' button to store the showreel in a casting shortlist for later reference.
Offer 'Next' and 'Previous' navigation controls (or a return link to the filtered showreel list) so users can step through multiple showreels that match their filters.
Reinforce casting-relevant details such as accent, age range, and notable credits to support selection decisions.

incoming_params.description: Showreel.id of the showreel to display.
Optional genre filter to restore when navigating back to the Showreels list.
Optional min_year value to restore on return.
Optional sort option identifier, e.g., 'most_recent'.
Optional page number of the originating Showreels list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to filtered showreels' breadcrumb link
Click 'Next' showreel navigation control
Click 'Previous' showreel navigation control

access_methods.description: Direct link to a specific showreel detail view can be shared in casting outreach

pages.name: Rates & Quotes
pages.description: Rates overview page with an Instant Quote Calculator and integrated inquiry form for project-specific quotes.
primary_functions: Present baseline rate information and example packages for common services (e.g., online ads, corporate narration, character work) to set expectations.

Provide an 'Instant Quote Calculator' section with controls for project type (including 'Online Ad / Web Commercial'), script length or duration (e.g., 60 seconds), usage duration options (e.g., 6 months, 12 months), and territory or usage area (e.g., Online – Worldwide).
Calculate and display an estimated fee dynamically as users adjust calculator inputs, enabling them to see when a configuration exceeds or falls within a target budget (e.g., $600).
Offer a 'Copy this quote to inquiry form' button that populates or reveals an inquiry form section on the same page with the chosen configuration details.
Enable users to complete and submit the inquiry form by entering name, email, and project details (e.g., the 60-second online ad voiceover request staying within a $600 budget).

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected project type identifier, e.g., 'online_ad_web_commercial'.
Optional prefilled script length in seconds for the calculator, e.g., 60.
Optional usage duration identifier, e.g., '12_months' or '6_months'.
Optional territory identifier, e.g., 'online_worldwide'.
Optional numeric budget cap (e.g., 600) to display alongside the estimate.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Prefer to book a session directly?' link near the inquiry form

access_methods.description: Can be opened with preconfigured calculator settings via query params, e.g., rates.html?project_type=online_ad_web_commercial&script_length_seconds=60
Direct links from RFPs or emails can point to a prefilled quote configuration

pages.name: Contact & Booking
pages.description: Central contact hub with separate forms for general inquiries and detailed booking requests.
primary_functions: Provide a tabbed interface or clear toggle between 'General Contact' and 'Booking Request' form types.

In the 'Booking Request' tab, offer fields for session type (e.g., Directed remote recording session), session length (e.g., 2 hours), date picker for scheduling (e.g., April 15, 2026), time selection (e.g., 10:00 AM), and time zone selection (e.g., America/New_York (UTC-5)).
Allow selection of preferred remote connection methods (e.g., checkboxes for Source-Connect and Zoom) and capture additional details such as backup times or special notes.
Provide a 'Submit Booking Request' button to send the booking form, along with inline validation and confirmation messaging.
Offer general contact information (email, phone, location) and a simple contact form for non-booking questions.

incoming_params.description: Optional starting tab, 'booking' or 'contact'. Defaults to 'contact' for header nav.
Optional preselected session type identifier, e.g., 'directed_remote_recording_session'.
Optional prefilled session length in hours for the booking form.
Optional ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) to prefill the booking date.
Optional time string (e.g., '10:00') to prefill the booking time.
Optional IANA time zone identifier, e.g., 'America/New_York'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View rates & quotes' link from the general contact tab

access_methods.description: Deeplinks can open directly to the booking tab via contact_booking.html?tab=booking
Casting directors can be sent directly to the booking form for specific sessions

pages.name: Clients & Testimonials
pages.description: Showcase of clients and testimonials with tools to filter by client type and year and to curate a list of favorite clients.
primary_functions: Display filters for 'Client type' (including 'Advertising / Marketing Agency') and for testimonial date or year (with the ability to set a starting year like 2022).
List testimonials matching the active filters, each with a short preview and a 'Read more' link that expands or opens the full testimonial content inline.
Allow users to mark a client as a favorite from the expanded testimonial view via an 'Add client to Favorites' or star icon.
Provide a 'Favorite Clients' or 'Favorites' tab/view on the same page where users can see all favorited clients and testimonials.
In the Favorites view, offer sorting options such as 'Sort by Company Name (A–Z)' to organize the favorite clients list.

incoming_params.description: Optional client type filter identifier, e.g., 'advertising_marketing_agency'.
Optional starting year for testimonials filter, e.g., 2022.
Optional maximum year for testimonials.
Optional sort identifier, e.g., 'date_desc' or 'client_name_asc'.
Optional view selector, 'all' or 'favorites'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Work with me' or 'Contact' button in the intro or favorites view

access_methods.description: Agencies can be sent a filtered link highlighting relevant testimonials

pages.name: Project Planner
pages.description: Interactive planner for assembling a combined voiceover and acting project with time and budget constraints.
primary_functions: Allow users to create a new project via a 'New Project' button and set a project title (e.g., 'VO + Acting Pilot').
Present a 'Voiceover Services' section where users can select specific options (e.g., 'Commercial voiceover – up to 60 seconds (1 hour session)') and adjust quantities if needed.
Present an 'Acting Services' section with options like 'On-camera self-tape – 2 scenes (2 hours session)' and alternatives (e.g., '1 scene (1 hour session)').
Continuously display a total session duration indicator that updates as services are added or changed, helping users stay within a target maximum (e.g., no more than 3 recording hours).
Provide fields to capture budget notes (e.g., 'Maximum budget: $900') and additional instructions (e.g., prioritize commercial voiceover), and a 'Save Project Plan' button to store the configuration.

incoming_params.description: Optional default project title to prefill when creating a new project.
Optional reference budget to display alongside the budget notes field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Estimate rates for this plan' button after configuring services
Click 'Request booking based on this plan' button

access_methods.description: Can be preloaded with a title or budget via query params, e.g., project_planner.html?title=VO%20+%20Acting%20Pilot
Producers can be sent directly to a new project planning view

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information on the talent, training, and studio capabilities for both voiceover and acting.
primary_functions: Present a professional bio covering voiceover and acting experience, training, notable credits, and representation if applicable.
Describe the recording studio setup, equipment, remote connection options (such as Source-Connect and Zoom), and typical workflow.
Answer high-level frequently asked questions about availability, turnaround times, revisions, and how to prepare scripts or sides.
Provide contextual links back to Voiceover, Acting, Rates & Quotes, and Contact / Booking pages for visitors ready to move to action.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Explore voiceover work' link in About content
Click 'Explore on-camera acting work' link in About content
Click 'View current rates & quotes' link in studio or FAQ section
Click 'Get in touch' call-to-action in About page

access_methods.description: Direct links from resumes, social media, or agent sites can point to about.html

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal page explaining how user data is collected, used, and stored on the site.
primary_functions: Explain what information is collected via forms (e.g., booking, quote inquiries, newsletter signup) and analytics, if any.
Describe how personal data such as email addresses and project details are used, including for sending newsletters and casting availability updates.
Outline data retention practices, third-party services involved (e.g., email marketing providers), and user rights related to their personal data.
Provide contact details for privacy-related questions or requests.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us about privacy' link within the policy text

access_methods.description: Can be accessed directly via privacy.html for compliance and policy references

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the website and engagement of the talent’s services.
primary_functions: Define the terms and conditions for using the website content, audio and video materials, and any downloadable assets.
Outline general terms for booking, payment, cancellations, revisions, and usage licenses associated with voiceover and acting work.
Clarify limitations of liability and intellectual property ownership.
Provide information about how changes to the terms will be communicated and how users can contact the site owner with legal questions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact for questions about these terms' link within the terms content

access_methods.description: Accessible directly via terms.html for legal references in contracts or correspondence

header_links.description: Homepage with overview of voiceover and acting services, featured demos, and newsletter signup.
Voiceover overview and demos, including commercial and character work with filters and ratings.
Acting portfolio with drama and other showreels, filters, and casting-focused information.
Rates overview plus Instant Quote Calculator and integrated quote inquiry form.
Tool to configure combined voiceover and acting projects within specific time and budget limits.
Client list and testimonials with filters and a Favorite Clients view.
Contact information and booking request forms for recording sessions and general inquiries.

footer_links.description: Learn more about the talent, studio, and workflow.
View acting showreels and on-camera work.
See rates and request a tailored quote.
Plan a combined voiceover and acting project.
Read testimonials and view favorite clients.
Get in touch or submit a booking request.
Review the website and service terms.
